free_text: Thermal and epithermal neutron activation analysis
14 elements in the standard rocks BCR-1 (basalt)
Analysis of BGR-1 and GR vs. scandium and cobalt
standards and analysis of standard rocks by epithermal
activation analysis are given in Tbl.5,6 at JRC,15,535
Application of the epithermal neutron activation

other Subents DECAY-DATA was added from J.Radioanal.
Chem.,15(1973)535. Subent 5 deleted - all other data
resonance integrals are measured versus cobalt through
epicadmium, so data from this Subent are used as
MONITOR for others. MONITOR moved to Subents 2-18.
